name: Toggle
description: CSS-only styled pressable toggle button. Apply class="sg-toggle" on a native <button> with aria-pressed.
whenToUse: Binary toggle controls in toolbars. Use class="sg-toggle" on a native <button aria-pressed>.
avoidWhen: On/off settings - use Switch. Multiple exclusive options - use ToggleGroup.
accessibilityRequirements: Uses aria-pressed for toggle state. Requires aria-label.

class.description: Use class="sg-toggle" on a native <button> with aria-pressed.

parts.name: ToggleGroup
parts.description: Group of mutually exclusive or multi-select toggles.
parts.whenToUse: Grouping related toggle options (text alignment, view modes).
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Uses role='group'. Children are Toggle components that read context.

size.description: Size applied to all child toggles.

examples.title: Toggle Buttons
examples.code: Bold: {bold}, Italic: {italic}

examples.title: Outline Variant
Toggle Group (Single)
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; alignment = (el.value ?? alignment); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; alignment = (el.value ?? alignment); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; alignment = (el.value ?? alignment); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; alignment = (el.value ?? alignment); }} aria-label="Text alignment">

Alignment: {alignment}

examples.title: Toggle Group (Multiple)
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; formats = (el.value ?? formats); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; formats = (el.value ?? formats); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; formats = (el.value ?? formats); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; formats = (el.value ?? formats); }} variant="outline" aria-label="Text formatting">

Formats: {formats.join(", ") || "none"}

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center">
    <button class="sg-toggle" data-size="sm" aria-label="Small toggle">SM</button>
    <button class="sg-toggle" data-size="md" aria-label="Medium toggle">MD</button>
    <button class="sg-toggle" data-size="lg" aria-label="Large toggle">LG</button>
</sg-stack>
